name: yes-confirms-single-domain-offer
description: After a specific-domain lookup (runSpecificDomainLookup), only ONE domain sits in domainOptions and the bot prompts 'Reply *yes* (or *1*) to pick it'. User typing 'yes' must select that single option — NOT fall through to the new-base-name search path that runs `runDomainSearchInline(user, 'yes')` and gets a 'registrar unreachable' error from the registrar's 500 on the literal 3-letter base 'yes'. Real tester convo from May 6 hit this path twice in the same session.
